calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE
Off Calendar Jan-03-2008 Set For Trial On Jan-03-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 611

SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Jan-03-2008 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Judge Diane Elan Wick, Clerk Karissa Shaw, Not Reported. (611)

APPEARANCES:
Plaintiff/Respondent Patricia C. Gacutan is present In Pro Per.
Plaintiff's witness Leilani Gacutan (daughter) is present.

Defendant/Appellant Kelcy Laybourn is present In Pro Per.
Defendant/Appellant Meghan Byers is present In Pro Per.

This matter comes on calendar for a Trial De Novo - Small Claims Appeal matter. Litigants are sworn and give individual testimony to the court. The litigants are allowed to cross-examine each other during individual testimony. Documentary evidence is introduced and provided to the court by the litigants. (The plaintiff's witness did not testify).

Upon the conclusion of testimony, the parties submit the matter for ruling by the court. The court decides to take this matter under submission.

The following exhibits were introduced during trial;

Plaintiff's Exhibit 1 - First Horizon, copy of P. Gacutan check to Sherry Manning dated 7/8/06 (Check #1035).

Plaintiff's Exhibit 2 - 4 pages, titled "1054 Sutter #5 - Leilani Gacutan Apt 7/15/06 to 7/15/07.

Plaintiff's Exhibit 3 - Chart with handwritten notations, titled "Accounting/Sutter #5 Rent".

Plaintiff's Exhibit 4 - Sutter Street Lease.

Defendant Laybourn's Exhibit 5 - Bank of America, copy of Cashier's Check to K. Laybourn from Trinity Management, Capture date 1/3/06 (Check #411399268).

Defendant Laybourn's Exhibit 6 - 2 pages, e-mail from L. Gacutan to K. Laybour, dated 7/9/06.

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jan-03-2008 Continued To Jan-03-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Nov-07-2007 Judgment Entered
